title: Tandem affinity purification of a bait host protein in presence of a viral protein
author: Benoit Besson
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jeqcjdw
materials: 50 mL IP buffer (1 week, 4°C) 45 mL of H 2 O 3mL from NaCl 5M stock (300 mM) 1,5 mL from Tris-HCl pH 7,4, 1M stock (30 mM) 0,5 g of Triton (1 %) 1 mM EDTA (supplemented with the tablet of protease inhibitor) * Add 1 tablet of protease inhibitor Complete (Roche) / 50 mL lysis buffer. * Add 1 tablet PhosStop (Roche) / 10 mL lysis buffer.

100 mL TBS 92 mL of H2O 5 mL from Tris-HCl, pH 7.4, 1M stock (50 mM) 3 mL from NaCl 5M stock (150 mM) TBS-ETDA 50 / 10 mL TBS 20 / 4 µL from EDTA 0,5 M (0,2 mM) 10 mL TBS-inhibitors TBS * Add 1 tablet of protease inhibitor Complete EDTA-free (Roche) / 10 mL TBS. * Add 1 tablet PhosStop (Roche) / 10 mL TBS. Prepare 3X Flag peptide Dissolve 3X flag peptide (F 4799; Sigma-Aldrich) in TBS-inhibitors at concentration 5 mg/mL. Aliquot and store at -20 o C. Repeated freezing and thawing is not recommended.

steps.title: Plate 5
steps.instruction: Plate 5. 10 6 (± 1/6,5 of a confluent T150) HeLa cells in 20 mL of DMEM 10% FBS, on 75cm flask. 10 flasks/condition. Incubate at 37 o C, 5% CO

steps.title: Lipofectamine 2000 mix
steps.instruction: Lipofectamine 2000 mix: 60 ul of Lipo + 940 ul of DMEM. DNA Mix: 10 ug of DNA (3,34 µg for V5-tagged viral protein + 6,66 µg for FLAG-GFP tagged bait) in 1mL of DMEM (final volume). Add 1 to 2, mix. Incubate 30 min at room temperature. Remove 5 mL of DMEM from the flask and add the 2 mL of transfection (final volume of 17 mL) Incubate 24 hours at 37 o C, 5% CO

steps.title: Remove culture medium
steps.instruction: Remove culture medium. Wash 2X with 1X PBS. Add 2 mL of PBS per flask. Scrap cells with cell scraper. Collect all in one 50 mL tube. Spin 3000 g, 10 min, 4°C Remove supernatant. Add 5 mL of IP buffer. Incubate 30 min, 4 o C, under gentle rotation. Transfer in 2 mL tubes. Spin 13,000 g, 30 min, 4 o C. Transfer supernatants to 15 mL tube Determine protein concentration with a BCA kit. Follow instructions from provider.

steps.title: Incubate 30 mg protein with 200...
steps.instruction: Incubate 30 mg protein with 200 µL agarose A/G beads (50% beads) in 15 mL tube. Incubate 1 hour, 4 o C, under gentle rotation. ----------------------- Prepare anti-FLAG Wash 200 µL beads ANTI-FLAG M2 beads (A2220; Sigma-Aldrich) with 1 mL IP buffer in 1,5 mL tubes. Spin 1 minute, 5000 g, 4 o Repeat 2X. ----------------------- Spin 2500 g, 5 min, 4 o Transfer supernatant to 200 µL ANTI-FLAG M2 beads in 15 mL tube. Incubate overnight, 4 o C, under gentle rotation.

steps.title: Spin 5000 g, 4 o C, 1 min
steps.instruction: Spin 5000 g, 4 o C, 1 min. Discard supernatant. Wash 3X with 1000 µL IP buffer (spin 1 min at 5000 g, 4°C). For elution, add 100 µL of 3X flag elution solution (1 mg/mL) to each sample (dilution with 10 mL TBS-inhibitors). Rotate 1 hour, 4 o

steps.title: Prepare GFP TRAP Wash 100 µL...
steps.instruction: Prepare GFP TRAP Wash 100 µL beads with 1 mL TBS-EDTA. Spin 5 minutes, 2500 g, 4 o C. Repeat 3X. ----------------------- Centrifuge resin for 5 minutes at 2500 g, 4 o Transfer supernatant to fresh tubes. E1, E2, E3 Repeat steps 8 to 11, 3X. Transfer E1-3 with 100 µL GFP TRAP_A beads (ChromoTek). Top up to 1 mL with TBS-EDTA. Rotate 1 hour, 4 o Centrifuge resin for 2 minutes at 2500 g, 4 o Remove supernatant. Wash 3X with 1000 µL TBS-EDTA. Re-suspend beads in 100 µL 2X LDS (NUPAGE, 4X), 1X Reducing agent (NUPAGE, 10X). 95°C, 10 min. 12500 g, 2 min. Freeze protein elution at -20 o Use 20 µL to run a western blot and check the presence/absence of controls. Run a keratin-free SDS-PAGE with 2 x 40 µL. Proceed to mass spectrometry.
